summary: Iteration 43 testing for CineWorld Studio's - Tested decimal skills (0.0-100.0), actor age distribution, Italian-only language, and release notes v0.095
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed bug in /app/frontend/src/contexts/index.jsx - setLanguage was referenced but not defined. Added no-op function since language is forced to Italian.
Removed language selector from AuthPage.jsx as per requirements - language selector was still visible on login page.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested: 1) Decimal skills working in all cast endpoints (actors, directors, screenwriters, composers) with values like 52.2, 41.5, 73.7. 2) Actor age distribution varies from young to old. 3) Language selector completely removed from auth page and navbar. 4) All UI text in Italian. 5) Release notes shows v0.095 as latest. 6) FilmWizard step 9 has automatic soundtrack rating with stars. 7) FilmWizard step 12 has detailed Italian cost breakdown (Riepilogo Costi, Costo Attrezzatura, etc.).

frontend_tests.login: PASSED - Login with test1@test.com / Test1234! works
frontend_tests.language_selector_removed: PASSED - No IT/EN buttons visible on auth page or dashboard
frontend_tests.italian_text: PASSED - All UI text in Italian (Accedi, Password dimenticata, Titolo, Genere, etc.)
frontend_tests.release_notes_v0095: PASSED - Shows 'NOTE DI RILASCIO' with v0.095 as current version
frontend_tests.step9_soundtrack_rating: VERIFIED IN CODE - Shows star rating with composer skill calculation
frontend_tests.step12_cost_breakdown: VERIFIED IN CODE - Shows Italian labels: Riepilogo Costi, Costo Attrezzatura, etc.
